mapper.select: select F.FILE_NO ,F.ORIGINAL_NAME ,F.FILE_SIZE ,CD.EXPIRE_ON ,CD.DOC_TYPE from FILE_INFO F right join COMPANY_DOC CD on(CD.FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO) where CD.COMPANY_NO = #{companyNo} and CD.DOC_TYPE not in ('LOGO', 'INTRO') order by F.FILE_NO desc
mapper.delete: delete from FILE_INFO where FILE_NO = ( select FILE_NO from COMPANY_DOC where COMPANY_NO = #{companyNo} and DOC_TYPE = 'LOGO' )
mapper.select: select F.ORIGINAL_NAME ,F.CHANGED_NAME ,F.MIME ,F.SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO F inner join COMPANY_DOC CD on (CD.FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO) where F.FILE_NO = #{fileNo} and CD.COMPANY_NO = #{companyNo}

select FI.SAVE_PATH ,FI.CHANGED_NAME from FILE_INFO FI inner join COMPANY_DOC CD on (FI.FILE_NO = CD.FILE_NO)
inner join COMPANY C on(C.COMPANY_NO = CD.COMPANY_NO)
where CD.COMPANY_NO = #{companyNo} and CD.DOC_TYPE = 'LOGO'
and C.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
select FILE_NO ,ORIGINAL_NAME ,CHANGED_NAME ,SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO where FILE_NO = ( select FILE_NO from COMPANY_DOC where COMPANY_NO =#{companyNo} and DOC_TYPE = 'LOGO' )
mapper.delete: delete from FILE_INFO where FILE_NO = ( select FILE_NO from COMPANY_DOC where DOC_TYPE = 'LOGO' and FILE_NO = #{fileNo} )
mapper.select:
select FI.ORIGINAL_NAME ,FI.CHANGED_NAME ,FI.MIME ,FI.SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO FI inner join COMPANY_DOC CD on (CD.FILE_NO = FI.FILE_NO)
inner join COMPANY C on (CD.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO)
where CD.COMPANY_NO = #{companyNo} and FI.CHANGED_NAME = #{changedName} and CD.DOC_TYPE = 'INTRO'
and C.STATUS = #{status}
